remix_method: collage of chopped vintage soul/funk/jazz over hip-hop breakbeats; multiple samples pitched/re-tuned to fit; post-2013 records live->tape->vinyl then re-samples to fake the 'off an old record' feel

tempo_bpm.note: high-BPM DB entries are OTHER artists' DnB/dubstep remixes, not his style

groove.syncopation: high; chopped stabs off-grid + glitch stutters

spectral_signature.low_end: big warm round analog low end (fat kick/bass), not modern sub-forward
spectral_signature.mids: warm forward soul mids are the emotional core (vocal chops, horns, Rhodes)
spectral_signature.highs_air: ROLLED-OFF / softened; vinyl crackle, hiss, tape saturation instead of crisp air

foreground_policy: chopped soul vocal hook (or lead phrase) is foreground; in remix context a target vocal sits there
arrangement: filtered lo-fi intro motif -> breakbeat drop -> vocal-chop groove -> filter-sweep breakdown to lone sample/keys -> soulful swell rebuild
harvestability: highly decomposable collage of loop-friendly chunks; but tape/vinyl glue means stems bleed into one tonal family

engine_mapping.note: estimates from sonic character, not measured; vinyl/tape rolled-off highs -> deliberately LOWER high3000 target than any bright modern mix; warm analog low end weighted to bass/kick not deep sub

confidence: medium-high (method/character high; tempo medium; key low; exact shares inferred)
